creator: john.c.prather@gmail.com
text:
I've applied the referenced patch successfully to the 3.8.7 version of
this port, and it's working successfully for me.

I approve applying this update to bring davmail up to 3.9.0 and add in
rc script and sample config.

Thanks, Chris!!!

> ---------- Forwarded message ----------
> From: Chris Rees <utisoft@gmail.com>
> Date: 24 February 2011 09:45
> Subject: Re: ports/154982: update mail/davmail to 3.9.0
> To: bug-followup@freebsd.org
>
>
> As per my email re ports/154903:
>
> I've merged together the changes:
>
> http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/davmail-3.9.0-with-rc-script.diff
>
> Hope that helps,
>
> Chris
>
